release_notes:
### ShibaClaw v0.1.4 🐛

- **Fix**: `AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'strip'` in memory consolidation when messages have multi-part content (e.g. OpenAI vision/tool format). Thanks [@itskun](https://github.com/itskun)!
- **Fix**: `shibaclaw channels status` now shows ALL channels including those with missing optional dependencies.
- **New**: `SHIBACLAW_DEBUG=true` env var for enabling full debug logging without `--verbose` flag.
upgrade_notes: Update to v0.1.4. Run `pip install --upgrade shibaclaw`. If using Docker, run `docker compose pull && docker compose up -d`.

changes.note: Fixed AttributeError on list content in _format_messages.
Log import errors instead of silently swallowing them.
Channel status now shows channels with missing deps.
Added SHIBACLAW_DEBUG commented example in common env.
